parents.subject: LU-20096 ldlm: alloc stats before procfs

commit.subject: LU-20164 lnet: Return correct error on alloc_ordered_workqueue failure
commit.message:
LU-20164 lnet: Return correct error on alloc_ordered_workqueue failure

Successful libcfs_setup() will overwrite rc to 0. Then,
if call to alloc_ordered_workqueue() fails, it error path
returns rc unmodified, ie value of 0.

This patch resets rc to -ENOMEM before returning on
alloc_ordered_workqueue failure.

Reported by cppcheck.

Test-Parameters: trivial testlist=lnet-selftest,sanity-lnet
Signed-off-by: Arshad Hussain <arshad.hussain@aeoncomputing.com>
Change-Id: Ie28756c7c9aee57ac3dcd6ea050b382944d63d4e
